creator: silb@silb.no
text:
Created attachment 156008
Patch from 2.0.2 to 2.1.0

Introduces a new dependency to devel/py-six.

Changes the OAuth dependency from net/py-oauth2 to security/py-oauthlib.

See setup.py [1] for the current requirements.

[1] https://github.com/discogs/discogs_client/blob/2.1.0/setup.py
